app.name: Genki
app.tagline: Offline-first treatment planning, reminders, adherence history, and Premium Google Drive sync.

errors.invalidCredentials: Use any email and a password with at least 6 characters.

hero.description: Plan medication routines, keep reminders on this device, and add Google Drive backup when Premium is active.
hero.title: Genki

sync.description: Google Drive backup stays separate from local treatment tracking.

items.description: Treatment plans and adherence history remain available without internet.
items.title: Works offline

items.description: Mobile store subscription unlocks backup and restore for $2.99/month.
items.title: Store IAP first

items.description: The purchase model leaves room for classic web checkout later.
items.title: Web purchases later

sync.priceDescription: Premium unlocks Google Drive sync only. Local plans, reminders, and history stay free.
sync.title: Sync when you want backup

treatment.description: Amoxicillin 500 mg, three reminders daily, for seven days.
treatment.instructions: Take with food and a full glass of water.
treatment.title: Treatment plan

planForm.description: Preserve the wording from the label or clinician instructions. Genki only structures the reminder schedule.
planForm.title: Create treatment plan

plans.description: Plans keep completed occurrence history intact when future schedules change.
plans.title: Treatment plans

notifications.description: Plan creation works without permission. Reminders require OS notification access.
notifications.title: Local reminders

premium.description: $2.99/month unlocks Google Drive sync and backup. Local treatment tracking stays free.
premium.title: Premium

sync.description: Use app-owned Google Drive storage. Conflicting edits are kept for manual review.
sync.title: Google Drive sync

today.description: Confirm each scheduled treatment without changing past history.
today.emptyDescription: Create a plan or resume a paused plan to see reminders here.
today.safetyDescription: Genki tracks what you entered. Follow the medication label or clinician instructions when they differ from the app schedule.
today.title: Today
